mapper.select:
SELECT ism.INQR_SBJC_ID , ism.INQR_SBJC_TTL , ism.PGST_CD , ccd.COM_CD_NM AS PGST_NM , ism.INQR_DSNC_CD , ccd_inq.COM_CD_NM AS INQR_DSNC_NM
, ism.RGSR_USIS_ID , ism.RGSN_USER_ID , ism.RGSN_USER_NM , ism.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INQR_SBJC_M ism LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ism.PGST_CD = ccd.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_inq ON ism.INQR_DSNC_CD = ccd_inq.COM_CD_ID WHERE 1=1
AND ( UPPER(ism.INQR_SBJC_TTL) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchContent}) || '%' OR UPPER(ism.INQR_SBJC_CON) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchContent}) || '%' )
AND UPPER(ism.RGSN_USER_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchUser}) || '%'
ORDER BY ism.RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT ism.INQR_SBJC_ID , ism.INQR_SBJC_TTL , ism.INQR_SBJC_CON , ism.INQR_SBJC_RPLY_CON , ism.PGST_CD , ccd.COM_CD_NM AS PGST_NM , ism.INQR_DSNC_CD , ccd_inq.COM_CD_NM AS INQR_DSNC_NM , ism.RGSR_USIS_ID , ism.RGSN_USER_ID , ism.RGSN_USER_NM , ism.RGSN_TS , ism.RPLY_MNGR_ID , ism.RPLY_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INQR_SBJC_M ism LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ism.PGST_CD = ccd.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_inq ON ism.INQR_DSNC_CD = ccd_inq.COM_CD_ID WHERE ism.INQR_SBJC_ID = #{inqrSbjcId}
